channel.title: Monerica - Newest and Sponsored Listings
channel.description: The latest additions and sponsors in our directory.

item.title: Satori Sandwich Bar
item.description: Businesses > Food & Drink (IRL) : Fresh, gourmet sandwiches on the Danforth - Location: 457A Danforth Ave, Toronto, ON M4K 1P1

item.title: MoneroXchange
item.description: Exchanges > Peer-to-Peer Exchanges : A privacy-first peer-to-peer marketplace for buying and selling Monero (XMR). Trade directly with other users using secure escrow. - Processor: Custom

item.title: ✅ Silent Exchange (sponsored)
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Fast & Anonymous Crypto to Crypto Swaps. No email. No KYC.Trade-in Minutes. 1500+ Crypto Pairs 24/7/365 Service Fee starting from 1%. - Note: Trade using Telegram Bot - @silentexchangerobot - Contact: Telegram: @silentexchange Email: silentexchange@protonmail.com

item.title: CrowdfundFlow
item.description: Businesses > Digital Goods/ Services : A Monero-first crowdfunding platform. Private, censorship-resistant funding for creators. Accept XMR and other crypto. You keep the keys.

item.title: Shaman.exchange
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Crypto swap

item.title: Stagenet Faucet
item.description: Utilities > Developer Tools : Monero stagenet faucet

item.title: Tristero
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Exchange

item.title: NoSINT
item.description: Businesses > Digital Goods/ Services : A powerful CSINT platform designed for security researchers, intelligence analysts, and investigative professionals. - Processor: Paylix

item.title: GhostSims
item.description: Businesses > Phone Plans, SMS & SIM Cards : Stay anonymous and secure with our encrypted SIM cards. No personal data required, no logs stored, works in 200+ countries worldwide. - Processor: NOWPayments

item.title: konkin.io
item.description: Businesses > AI Services : The self-custodial crypto wallet wrapper for AI agents

item.title: Quiverflow CRM
item.description: Businesses > Marketing : One of the most robust, flexible, and affordable marketing platforms available today. It's a competitive alternative to well-known solutions like HubSpot. - Note: Monero (XMR) is accepted by creating a payment invoice and sending a payment link to your email or chat. You’ll just follow the link to pay with XMR. - Location: Vancouver, BC - Contact: @sebp888

item.title: molt.productions
item.description: Businesses > AI Services : AI Music Agent + Music Creation Social App - Note: utilizes xmr402 for microtxn payments to pay for AI agents to generate songs for your agents with XMR - Processor: Custom - Contact: @molt_production

item.title: NoirTrade
item.description: Exchanges > Centralized Exchanges : Privacy-focused centralized exchange with no KYC or identity verification. Zero-log policy. Identity-free registration with password only; no email required. - Processor: Custom

item.title: BlazeX
item.description: Onion Only > Markets : Legal marketplace - Note: Instant and manual delivery, physical products and more

item.title: MiXXchange
item.description: Exchanges > Aggregators : A non-custodial, KYC-free crypto toolkit with direct partner connections. - Note: Compare numerous instant exchanges to identify the one offering the most favorable offer. - Contact: https://x.com/MiXXchange_com

item.title: BYDFi
item.description: Exchanges > Centralized Exchanges : XMR/USDT perpetuals

item.title: ✅ MoneroPriceNow.com
item.description: Finance > Price Display : Shows Monero prices across different instant swap exchanges.

item.title: XMR402
item.description: Non-Profits > Miscellaneous : An open, neutral standard for internet-native payments.

item.title: BlockSwap
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Private. Fast. 600+ cryptocurrencies.

item.title: Ybex.io
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Exchange and convert cryptocurrency online quickly, safely and conveniently.

item.title: Duke Nukem search
item.description: Non-Profits > Search Engines : Proxy search engine.

item.title: ✅ Wagyu.xyz (sponsored)
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Seamlessly bridge assets between Monero and Hyperliquid with Wagyu. Private Cross-Chain Bridge. The first decentralized orderbook exchange supporting native XMR deposits. - Note: US citizens are not welcome in using any Wagyu products - Contact: https://t.me/PerpetualCow

item.title: Monero MCP Server
item.description: Utilities > Open Source Projects : The world's first MCP server for Monero. Give any AI agent a private wallet.

item.title: XMRPrivate
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Convert public cryptocurrencies into XMR using a privacy-first routing flow.

item.title: SwapWatch
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Your gateway to the world of digital currencies

item.title: NexuLume
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Anonymous crypto exchange

item.title: LeoExchanger
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Automatic exchanger

item.title: YoChange
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Currency exchange and electronic money exchange service

item.title: Ruby Cash
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Digital currency exchange platform

item.title: Instant Exchangers
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Swap crypto around the world

item.title: Abcobmen
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Friendly and fast exchange

item.title: Netexbit
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Electronic currencies exchanger

item.title: Mine Exchange
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Automatic electronic currency exchange

item.title: Stoxswap Swapper
item.description: Exchanges > Peer-to-Peer Exchanges : A manual swapper supporting XMR, BTC, ETH, TRX and USDT(ERC20/TRC20). Because of its manual operation we support mixing/anonymizer services discreetly. - Location: Muscat - Processor: Direct to wallet - Contact: @g64group on Telegram

item.title: Monero Merchant Directory - Monero Forum
item.description: Other Directories > Business Directories : Browse websites and services that accept Monero (XMR).

item.title: Donate Monero
item.description: Other Directories > Charities : Monero donation directory

item.title: Iran Netlify
item.description: Non-Profits > Knowledge : Iran censorship bypass blog

item.title: Lantern VPN
item.description: Non-Profits > Technologies : Help Iranians bypass censorship

item.title: Panther Exchange
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Fast and secure way to exchange crypto currencies

item.title: LizardSwap
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Private. Fast. Transparent. Zero KYC. Full control.

item.title: VeritasProxy
item.description: Businesses > Proxies : $0.99/GB residential, $1.5/GB Mobile, $0.5/GB data center fresh IP pool - Processor: Heleket - Contact: @VeritasProxySupport

item.title: RahmTech Computing, Inc.
item.description: Businesses > IT Services : Affordable and reliable managed IT services and remote support solutions for residential and commercial clients. Specializing in Dell, Sonicwall, Unifi and N-Able products. - Location: Veedersburg, Indiana - Processor: Direct to wallet - Contact: info@rahmtech.com

item.title: Giallo - Art Director & Designer
item.description: Freelancers > Designers : Experienced Art Director and Designer. 20 years of experience in Web and Print design with several International brands and Companies. - Note: You can contact me in Twitter/X or send me a request directly - Contact: @gialloxmr giallographics@proton.me

item.title: Bitkit.money
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : XMR swap services, non-KYC crypto exchanges - Contact: @bitkitmoney

item.title: Sauce Nao
item.description: Non-Profits > Technologies : Reverse Image search engine

item.title: ❓ Jud-ex
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Instant crypto exchange | No KYC/AML

item.title: InstantShippingLabels.com
item.description: Businesses > Postage & Shipping Services : Shipping labels instantly. USPS, Fedex, UPS, Canada Post and more.

item.title: EarnMonero
item.description: Utilities > Developer Tools : A free Monero faucet where you can claim every 5 minutes.

item.title: ✅ MoneroDice (sponsored)
item.description: Businesses > Gambling : Simple, fast, privacy-respecting dice and blackjack game. Provably fair mode for dice is available too. - Contact: contact [at] monerodice.pro

item.title: ✅ StereoSwap
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : A privacy-focused swap platform designed for those who want full control over their crypto without compromises. We don’t ask for KYC, emails, or accounts. - Contact: https://x.com/stereo_swap

item.title: UsenetNews
item.description: Businesses > Digital Goods/ Services : Usenet provider with 3 completely independent server farms

item.title: ThunderNews
item.description: Businesses > Digital Goods/ Services : Usenet Newsgroup Provider For 12+ Years - Note: 5672 days retention - Processor: BTCPay Server

item.title: NewsDemon
item.description: Businesses > Digital Goods/ Services : Premium Usenet service - Note: 5672 days retention + included VPN - Processor: BTCPay Server

item.title: EasyUsenet
item.description: Businesses > Digital Goods/ Services : Reliable Usenet service since 2007 - Note: 3700+ days retention - Processor: Coin Payments

item.title: UsenetExpress
item.description: Businesses > Digital Goods/ Services : Tier1 Usenet Provider - Note: 4000+ days retention

item.title: AutoMonero
item.description: Communities > Telegram :

item.title: MellowAds
item.description: Businesses > Marketing : A crypto powered PTC ad network that pays for your attention. View ads, earn rewards daily and cash out to your wallet when you're ready.

item.title: Monero Denmark
item.description: Communities > Telegram :

item.title: Frugal Usenet
item.description: Businesses > Digital Goods/ Services : Cheap Usenet Accounts - Note: 4500 days retention

item.title: UsenetNow
item.description: Businesses > Digital Goods/ Services : Usenet provider with servers in 6 regions - Note: 4500 days retention - Processor: MyCryptoCheckout

item.title: BlockNews
item.description: Businesses > Digital Goods/ Services : Usenet block accounts provider

item.title: Spoof Caller ID
item.description: Businesses > Phone Plans, SMS & SIM Cards : No KYC spoof call & SMS. - Location: Tallinn

item.title: XMR Tix - Monero Raffle
item.description: Onion Only > Gambling : Monero Raffle : Buy Tickets for 0.01 XMR, winners are determined by the blockchain :: tx-id as ticket numbers, blockhash as draw, smallest difference wins.

item.title: Ask&Bid
item.description: Exchanges > Aggregators : Privacy-focused DeFi services such as a cryptocurrency exchange aggregator and 100% free Wallet AML Check. Helping to find the best rates for your swaps without KYC - Location: London - Contact: support@askand.bid

item.title: ❓ Instaswap
item.description: Exchanges > Aggregators : All-in-one decentralized (DEX) aggregator with multi-blockchain support for retail, wallets, exchanges and TradFi. - Note: Misleading site which doesn't have XMR pairs when attempting swap and asks for wallet connect

item.title: XMR-Compass
item.description: Other Directories > Crypto Exchanges : Monero funding rates tracker.

item.title: Bull Miners
item.description: Businesses > Electronics/ Computer Hardware : High-quality crypto mining equipment. Backed by years of innovation and exceptional performance, designed to maximize your earnings. - Processor: Mycryptocheckout

item.title: Antikyc
item.description: Other Directories > Crypto Exchanges : A curated directory of anonymous crypto exchanges and privacy-first services. - Note: Some listings are sponsored. - Contact: @antikyc_io

item.title: XMR Directory - XMRHub
item.description: Other Directories > Business Directories : Your comprehensive guide to the Monero ecosystem

item.title: Saxemberg
item.description: Nodes > Public Remote Nodes & Operators : A Monero node operator with Tor and HTTP options with a dedicated server and bandwidth located in Northern Europe. - Contact: @saxemberg

item.title: ✅ Devil.Exchange (sponsored)
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Anonymous crypto swaps — no KYC, no account. Flat 0.5% fee. - Contact: support@devil.exchange

item.title: Antifine
item.description: Non-Profits > Activism : Pays off fines for anti-war protestors in Russia

item.title: Anonymous Crypto Lending
item.description: Finance > Interest/ Loans : Privacy-preserving DeFi lending. Earn yield on deposits, borrow against collateral — all shielded via Railgun ZK-SNARKs on Arbitrum.

item.title: MoneroSwapper
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Private and fast instant swap service focused on Monero. No registration, no KYC, no email required. Swap between XMR and 200+ cryptocurrencies in minutes with competitive rat - Contact: contact@moneroswapper.com

item.title: Off Grid
item.description: Cards > Prepaid Cards : The privacy-first crypto card program for modern spending. - Contact: @offgridcash on Twitter

item.title: ✅ FleetProxy.io (sponsored)
item.description: Businesses > Proxies : Rotating Mobile, Residential, Datacenter Proxies | Mobile LTE, Static Residential | IPv4/6 Datacenter - Note: 30% off first order - Processor: Cryptomus - Contact: support@fleetproxy.io

item.title: Swapper
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Non-custodial instant swap between XMR and USDC (Arbitrum). No account, no KYC. Available via web, Telegram bot, and API. - Note: Also available as a Telegram bot for messaging-first users. Supports programmatic integrations via HTTPS API.

item.title: Purple Swap
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Gateway to instant, secure, and anonymous crypto exchanges - Location: Rte de la Galaise 24, 1228, Plan-les-Ouates

item.title: ❌ DarkChange
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Anonymous No-KYC Crypto Exchange - Note: Connected to other scammer groups

item.title: Monero Malware Response
item.description: Education > Guides : Provides resources and live support for multiple types of Monero malware.

item.title: ✅ OctoSwap (sponsored)
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Digital asset exchange. No limits, low fee, no KYC/own XMR liquidity. 24/7 Support, AML check - Contact: support@octoswap.io

item.title: Quantum Proxies
item.description: Businesses > Proxies : Premium residential & datacenter proxies. - Processor: NowPayments

item.title: ✅ SageSwap (sponsored)
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Never KYC, No AML, No Login, and No JavaScript. Fast and private swap service. - Note: 1-2% FEE | 24/7 - Contact: https://SageSwap.io/Support

item.title: View & Rate
item.description: Non-Profits > Technologies : An open database for verifiable online reputations.

item.title: ❓ Crypto Bitmart
item.description: Businesses > Electronics/ Computer Hardware : Transforming the e-commerce world by providing a smooth and secure shopping experience with cryptocurrency. - Note: Possible scam site which is taking the place of former scam site Apple Bitcoins, also located in UK.

item.title: My Node Pay
item.description: Businesses > Proxies : Buy products from Amazon, eBay, and 500+ stores worldwide using Monero, Ethereum, Bitcoin and more. No bank account needed.

item.title: PayWithUs
item.description: Cards > Prepaid Cards : Unlock the power of financial flexibility with instant virtual cards, where convenience meets innovation. - Note: KYC is required to get card

item.title: Bridgoro
item.description: Exchanges > Decentralized Exchanges : Semi-decentralized exchange.

item.title: BitList
item.description: Other Directories > Crypto Exchanges : A curated catalog of #kycfree exchanges. Verified by the community, tracked in real-time. - Contact: icopress / TryNinja on Bitcointalk

item.title: KYC.RIP - market
item.description: Cards > Gift & Prepaid Cards : Gift and prepaid cards

item.title: Coin Wallet
item.description: Onion Only > Wallets : Self-custodial multicurrency wallet - Location: Georgia - Contact: CoinAppWallet

item.title: b1eXch
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Fast, private cryptocurrency exchange - Note: The domain name has been changed from .io to .to.

item.title: Private Coffee
item.description: Non-Profits > Technologies : List of Privacy-respecting alternatives to common services

item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : A modern cryptocurrency exchange platform built for speed, simplicity, and security.

item.title: Bypass City
item.description: Non-Profits > Technologies : Bypasses shortlinks

item.title: ✅ Cake Wallet (sponsored)
item.description: Wallets > Mobile Wallets : Allows you to safely store, send, receive, and exchange your XMR, BTC, and LTC (and exchange other currencies) - Location: United States

item.title: xmr2cex
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : Fast & Simple Monero Exchange. Get premium, 100% clean coins directly from Binance, Gate, or another top CEX. - Contact: xmr2cex@xmpp.is

item.title: 0x0
item.description: Non-Profits > Technologies : Temporary file hoster

item.title: ✅ CCE Cash (sponsored)
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : This is a fully automated service that allows you to quickly exchange various cryptocurrencies such as XMR, BTC, ETH, and SOL without requiring identity verification. - Contact: https://x.com/Cce_Cash

item.title: Swaps
item.description: Exchanges > Decentralized Exchanges : Trade native cryptos on-chain BTC, ETH, XMR, USDT, USDC and more.

item.title: MoneroDroid
item.description: Nodes > Node Software & Deployment : Mobile Monero Node.

item.title: ClearSwap
item.description: Exchanges > Aggregators : Enables confidential swaps at scale with advanced routing and support for privacy networks.

item.title: ✅ Mynymbox (sponsored)
item.description: Web Hosting > VPS & Dedicated Server Providers : Privacy Hosting Solutions - VPS Servers, Dedicated Servers, Web Hosting, Domain Name Registrations - Location: Charlestown - Processor: BTCPay Server - Contact: @mynymbox on Twitter

item.title: reader.dict
item.description: Education > E-Books : The most comprehensive universal, multilingual, and monolingual dictionaries—perfect for e-readers, phones, tablets, and desktop apps. Powered by Wiktionary. - Contact: github.com/reader-dict

item.title: ✅ xChange.me (sponsored)
item.description: Exchanges > Instant Swaps : No kyc instant exchange since 2017. Tor mirror, CLI client, fully anonymous, private and safe. - Location: Marshall Islands - Contact: @xchange_me_

item.title: ✅ Coincards (sponsored)
item.description: Cards > Gift & Prepaid Cards : Gift cards from hundreds of top brands, including Amazon, Walmart, Airbnb, Uber, DoorDash, Home Depot, and even Visa or Amex cards, with values up to $2,000. - Location: Surrey, B.C. - Processor: BTCPay Server
